    @allure.title("Verify creating a student with partial fields")
    @allure.description(
        "Verify that creating a new student with only partial fields returns the expected status code "
        "and contains the provided data."
    )
    def test_create_student_partial_fields(self, students_flows: StudentsApiFlows):
        # יוצרים סטודנט עם רק firstName ו-email
        partial_payload = {
            "firstName": "Tomer",
            "email": "tomer.partial@example.com"
        }
    
        response = students_flows.api.post(STUDENTS_BASE_URL, payload=partial_payload)
    
        # בודקים סטטוס קוד
        expected_status = 201  # או 400/422 אם ה-API מחייב שדות נוספים
        actual_status = response.status
        print(f"Expected status: {expected_status}, Actual status: {actual_status}")
